title: Jharsuguda Burns! Record Temperature Leaves People Struggling to Survive - Kanak News Odisha
full_text:
Jharsuguda has recorded soaring temperatures, pushing it into the list of the hottest cities in India. The intense heatwave has severely affected daily life, with people struggling to cope with the scorching conditions.
Authorities have urged citizens to take precautions as the heatwave continues. Relief is now eagerly awaited with hopes of weather changes in the coming days.
